description: Expand CI/CD to build and deploy all apps + services. Today .github/workflows/ci.yml's docker matrix = [ws-gateway], and deploy-production.yml / deploy-staging.yml hardcode SERVICES="ws-gateway".
steps: Update .github/workflows/ci.yml: replace the single-entry docker matrix with the full list of app backends + services (matrix.image), building each new Dockerfile. Keep the existing OOM mitigation (--concurrency=3, NODE_OPTIONS heap) for Next builds.
Update deploy-staging.yml and deploy-production.yml: replace SERVICES="ws-gateway" with the full workload list (or derive from a single source, e.g. a workloads.json read by both CI and Helm).
Add image build+push (GHCR) per workload, tagged by commit SHA; gate deploy on the existing quality-gates + zero-defect-gates passing.
Wire `helm template` / `helm lint` and `terraform plan` (infra/terraform) into a CI check (currently unvalidated per risk-register R-105).
Verify the workflows parse (actionlint) and the matrix expands to all workloads.
acceptance_criteria: CI docker matrix builds every app backend + service image
Deploy workflows reference the full workload list (no hardcoded ws-gateway-only)
helm template/lint + terraform plan run in CI
